feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build Apps
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Apps Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: App Builder IOS compilation error for imported app
entry.content:
Hi, i'm currently experiencing this issue while compiling my app in Appgyver App Builder Community Edition, here is the error stack, please give some advices and let me build the app:

 

Runtime version: 4.9.148; AB version: 2.0.0-alpha.1COMMAND:
npxrnv export -p ios -s standalone_appstore -c standalone --ci --yes --skipRnvCheck --packageManager yarn --template @appgyver/orchestra-template-standalone@4.9.148 -r --xcodebuildArchiveArgs "OTHER_CODE_SIGN_FLAGS=\"--keychain\ AppGyver-81712\""
FAILED with ERROR:
Command failed with exit code 1: npx rnv export -p ios -s standalone_appstore -c standalone --ci --yes --skipRnvCheck --packageManager yarn --template @appgyver/orchestra-template-standalone@4.9.148 -r --xcodebuildArchiveArgs "OTHER_CODE_SIGN_FLAGS=\"--keychain\ AppGyver-81712\""

entry.title: How to recover app in Appgyver
entry.content: Hi, I did not receive the notification about Appgyver to SAP migration. I cannot access the old appgyver app anymore after the migration deadline. Is there any way for rescuing the old app and migrate it to SAP build app now? Thanks!!

entry.title: Preview on your device
entry.content:
I can't view my project on my cell phone using the app. page returns error when confirming PIN.

Open SAP Build Apps app on your device link https://ge-buildapps-us10.cfapps.eu10-004.hana.ondemand.com/launch/ SAP Build Apps your temporary PIN code is XXXXX session failed . 

my cell phone Android

confirm PIN ....

entry.title: Regarding SAP Build Apps Authentication issue
entry.content:
Hello all,

I am Sugandha. I have been using SAP Build Apps for quite some time and I am facing issues while configuring SAP BTP destination REST API integration. When I am testing the inputs, it gives me error 404. I have followed all the steps given in the below tutorial (attaching the link). - https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/build-apps-workflow-trigger.html#23115af3-8c2e-487a-b50a-ecdc7c8a8fce (please refer to step no.5 for my query. I am stuck on that). As per the error, my definition ID is incorrect but I am just copy-pasting it.

Attaching an image for your refernce - 

 

Please guide me. Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Consume OData service from On Premise in SAP Build
entry.content:
Hi,

Greetings!

 

Customer has his BTP accounts setup model as a common CF sub account for multiple business units with no Integration Suite but serverless runtime extension center for now.

Customer would like to start using SAP Build Portfolio (Build Apps, Build Process Automation and Build Work zone Standard Edition) with the above setup and has the following queries - 

1) Backend SAP systems are SAP ECC6 EHP6 on-premise and S4 Hana on-premise in AWS and currently using BTP Serverless Runtime Extension Center for OData Provisioning - can the OData services from these on-premise systems be accessible in SAP Build Apps, Build Process Automation and Build Workzone via extension center? or is exposing services via CAP or RAP the only alternative solution available?

2) With this single sub account setup how can it be ensured that from a security perspective only authorized user of a particular business unit can access an application apart from authorization setup in launchpad and as well as how can other business unit developers be not allowed to access other application code base.

Regards,

Vipin.

SAP Build SAP Build Apps SAP Build Process Automation SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition SAP Business Technology Platform

entry.title: Need Help on SBPA Concepts Regarding Variables
entry.content:
I'm slowly getting there.  I appreciate all the help and guidance I've been given so far.

For the process I've created, I have an Environment variable that gets passed into the process (more to be added) but I don't want to use a form in the process to gather this information.  I want to create an SAP Build App to get the information from the user and pass it to the Process as it gets executed. 

What I'm unclear about is, since I won't have a form in the Process, is it a good idea to use the Environmental variable to capture the information that's coming from the App or is there a better way to accomplish this?

Any ideas and/or suggestions would be gratefully appreciated.

Thanks!

Ron

entry.title: SAP BTP Cockpit Developer Account
entry.content:
Hello, I created an account to create SAP Build App via SAP BTP Cockpit.
As an admin, I can log in to the Lobby section, but I open accounts for other people to make developments, but they cannot log in to the Lobby section.
I looked at the documentation on this issue, but I couldn't figure it out. Can you help me?
Thanks

My screenshots are as follows.

SAP BTP Cockpit

SAP BTP Cockpit

 

 

 

 

 

SAP BTP Cockpit - Subaccount
SAP BTP Cockpit Subaccounts

 

 

 

 

 

 

SAP BTP Lobby

Build Lobby Login Page

entry.title: Facing issues to create Sales order (Create Record not working).
entry.content:
Hello,

I've been trying to create an application which showcases creating the sales order in the system. ( Using the API : API_SALES_ORDER_SRV
Initially, was facing CSRF Token validation failure issue. (403 Forbidden error). Then i tried bypassing it.. by setting the parameter : ~CHECK_CSRF_TOKEN to 0 in the SICF Configuration of service.

Now that error disappeared and another issue like "500 internal server error" (Error while processing the resource). 

(I tried using odata integration and BTP Destination REST API Integration as well but same issue.)


This is my input Record details: 
{SalesOrder: "1022", SalesOrderType: "OR", SalesOrganization: "UW00",DistributionChannel: "WH",OrganizationDivision:"BI",SoldToParty: "1000",PurchaseOrderByCustomer:"test", RequestedDeliveryDate:"2024-01-18T09:56:12.123Z"}


Can anybody help here what could be the potential problem?

Thanks in Advance!

entry.title: Not able to access Appgyver composer / Classic sap appgyver
entry.content:
Hi,

I developed my first app in Appgyver composer pro and now i am not able to login to old appgyver which is redirecting to sap build apps and i have my real time application developed using that

entry.title: SAP Build Apps Integration with Build Process automation Errored out as 422.
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I am trying to integrate SAP Build Apps and Build process automation through API calls. To achieve this I followed the below steps.

Step 1: Create an Api trigger in process automation.

Step 2: Exposed the Workflow API instance in Postman, I got 201 status code as created success fully message as shown bellow.

Step3: Created a destination with the same URL in SAP BTP as shown bellow .

Step4: verified the Check connection at destination level I Got status code as 401: unauthorized. Mapped the same destination at Build Apps at DATA level while testing the Destination got 422 as status code.

Please provide any suggestions to resolve this Issue.

 

Thanks,

Prathyusha

entry.title: Build Error (SAP Build Apps - Community Edition)
entry.content:
Hello!

I've tried building the newest version of my web app last night and this morning and got errors each time.

Any thoughts? @Timo 

Thanks!

entry.title: Resource Schema Configuration in SAP Build Apps Destination to BPA Service
entry.content:
I have a BPA project that I want to use an API Unattended Trigger to execute.  I am creating a Destination to the BPA service instance and when I get to the Resource schema, the information in tutorials is a bit confusing.

What fields should be going into the schema?  Is it the values I want to pass to the BAP process or would those go down in "Additional Inputs?  Is there something else I need to add in the Resource schema?

My end goal is to have a Build Apps application execute the trigger, passing in the parameters it has gathered.

Any ideas and/or suggestions would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks!

Ron

entry.title: SAP Build Apps - IOS SDK version warning
entry.content:
Dear SAP Build Apps Team,

A few of our latest iOS builds returned a warning from Apple mentioning that from April 29, 2024, all iOS apps shall be built with iOS 17SDK or later. While the current SDK in use is iOS 16.2 SDK. 

This post here is just a request and a notification to raise awareness of this issue. 

Best regards.

PS. We just want to avoid last year's case where iOS builds were not accepted by Apple for a few weeks until the issue has been resolved. So we'd be glad if this issue got priority and matched the deadlines set out by Apple.

entry.title: How to handle if-match header via BTP destination?
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I am trying to achieve a patch call using Build APPs with a required if-match header, how can this be handled via BTP destination for REST API. In this case I am using Service Cloud V2 Case API: https://tenantid/sap/c4c/api/v1/case-service/cases/UUID

Your valuable response is much appreciated.

entry.title: Error when I set the data source of a data action in Build Apps
entry.content:
I have a Build App project where I have a dropdown that I want to set a data source on.  I created an Action with a GET request for months within a given year.  When I test the action, I get a 200 response and 12 months come back.  I then release and publish the action to the library.

When I try to add that action as a Data Source, I get this message. I've tried waiting but I get the same thing every time.

I'm hoping that someone has had this issue before and knows of a solution.

Thanks in advance!

Ron

entry.title: Using an OData API get records back to back in a single page by clicking a button in SAP Build Apps.
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am using an OData API which is carrying around 1000 of records, we are calling first 20 records through pagination in data variable, is there any way to call the rest of the data in a form of 20 records in a repetitive manner on the same page by configuring a button in SAP Build Apps.

Thanks in advance,
Yashmin

@Dan_Wroblewski , @marihirvi , @StephanKoenig , @Ian_Thain , @SandipAgarwalla

entry.title: SAP Build apps upload files intergrate to process automation
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am trying to integrate files upload from SAP Build Apps into my process automation approval inbox. To achieve this I have followed below steps.

Step1: created a process automation creating input variable type as upload file as shown below :

Step2 :Created a project in SAP Build Apps for upload document as shown below

Step3: Map the variables at data level in SAP Build Apps

When I execute the build apps Form document is upload successfully I am getting toast message as below 

But the issue is unloaded document is not coming to inbox of my process automation, Please advice any suggestion to resolve this issue.

Thanks,

Rupesh

entry.title: In Build Apps, Row Cells are Changing Their Width
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm trying to create a grid, like a blank calendar where I can insert data into the cells from a data source.  I created a container and put 5 rows in it with 7 columns in each row.

The top row is where I wanted to put the days of the week as a header so I started by putting a text component in the first cell of the first row.

When I did that, the width of that cell increased, throwing off the borders of the cells for the other rows.  I tried setting the minimum and maximum width of the container, the rows and each cell within the row and it still does it.  

This is what it look like before I add the text:

And this is what it looks like when I add the text field:

Is there a way to absolutely lock the width of a cell in a row?  I know they are actually containers so I'm a little puzzled about this.

Thanks for any and all suggestions!

Ron

entry.title: Create a New Button and Add it to a Container Using Custom JavaScript in SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a container that I want to dynamically add a button to using custom JavaScript when I click a button that already exists in the form.

This is the code I've tried and i know that the Component ID of the container is correct but the button isn't showing up.  I'm guessing that maybe I'm not creating the button correctly?  Also, I haven't done anything with the inputs or Outputs.  Is that something that I would need to do?

const container = document.getElementById("9f1b57c7-72a2-4d17-9c20-91ab6dbecc4c");
const newButton = document.createElement("button");
newButton.textContent = "Click Here";
container.appendChild(newButton);

Thanks in advance!

Cheers,

Ron

entry.title: Can I use DOX Custom Schemas (w/ AI functionality) with the DOX SDK in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi,

Can I use DOX Custom Schemas (w/ AI functionality) with the DOX SDK in SAP Build Process Automation?

I know that premium version is needed. 

If yes, how can I enhance the DOX SDK.

 

Thanks !

Tillbtp
